name: House Always Wins

abilities.name: Deal Me In
abilities.text: When this model declares the Prepare action, it may gain a Brilliance token instead of other tokens.

abilities.name: "I'll Raise"
abilities.text: When this model declares an attack action, it may remove a Brilliance token from itself. If it does so and succeeds, it receives an additional raise.

actions.name: A Debt Called In
actions.effects: Damage from this action is irreducible. Look at the top three cards of the target's deck and put them back in any order.

tokens.name: Brilliance
tokens.text: Referenced in abilities Deal Me In and "I'll Raise" but full token rules not provided on this card.

extraction_notes: Card shows Brilliance token referenced in multiple abilities
Attack action symbols appear to be (sig) for signature and (magic) for attack type based on visual layout
Faction cannot be determined from this card image alone
